run_summary.summary: Five deals touched today. Yousky is officially dead — Luna confirmed $250 is their ceiling and they're done negotiating, time to close that card. New inbound from Make Wonder INC: Wise Block paid collab for 1x IG/YT video, Eastern Botanical building set series, VERY tight launch window of Apr 25–30 — Iris needs your quote today. Flexsteel/Steinhafels campaign enrollment confirmed 'in progress' on Popfly; Kenny also mentioned a retail store visit Thursday, so heads up on that. Linkind sent detailed filming specs today — nighttime-only shots, 50% lighting focus, must show app switching patterns with color animations, correct lens installed. SOJOS voiceover revision still on the to-do list and ticking.

suggestions.message: Luna confirmed today: $250 is their absolute max, won't move. Five weeks of negotiation, zero progress toward your $2K rate. Recommend marking this as dead and closing the card — don't let it sit and clutter the board. 🚫

New paid collab in your inbox from Make Wonder INC (Iris). Botanical Series building sets — 1x IG or YT video. They want to launch Apr 25–30, which is THIS WEEKEND. Need your rate quote today or tomorrow to have any shot at moving forward. 🌸

Concept approved, content due Mon/Tue (Apr 27–28). Filming specs from today: nighttime ONLY, no daylight shots, 50% of video = lighting effects, must show app switching color patterns + animations. Film this weekend and make sure the lens is installed correctly! $2,000 on the line. 🎬
Ruby's voiceover revision is still waiting. Quick addition — record a brief intro introducing SOJOS and the sunglasses over your existing video and resubmit so this doesn't get stuck at approval. 🕶️
Popfly just dropped a $5,000 Victorinox Swiss Tool campaign — application deadline April 30. You already use Popfly (Flexsteel deal). Worth a look if tools/outdoor fits your content calendar! 🛠️
Two BlackStrap campaigns on Popfly: Family Ambassador ($3K + $1.2K product) and Individual Ambassador ($2.5K + $700 product), both deadline April 28. Fast turnaround — does spring/outdoor fit? 🎿

deals.next_action: Send rate quote to Iris at Make Wonder INC for Botanical Series collab
deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Iris from Make Wonder INC (official agency for Wise Block/Alpha Group) reached out for 1x YouTube or IG video featuring Eastern Botanical Series building sets (Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony). Paid collab + free product set. Launch window Apr 25–30 — extremely tight. Need to reply with rate ASAP.
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: New inbound — Make Wonder INC/Wise Block paid collab, tight Apr 25–30 launch window, awaiting our quote

deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Luna confirmed final answer — $250 max fee, will not go higher. Liz held firm at $2,000 throughout 5+ weeks of negotiation (initial ask $2,500, dropped to $2,000 on Mar 24). Deal is at a dead end at our rate. Recommend closing.
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Luna at Yousky confirmed $250 is their ceiling — deal is dead at our rate, recommend closing

deals.next_action: Begin content creation for Flexsteel/Steinhafels Popfly campaign
deals.notes: [Apr 22]: Kenny confirmed to Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com) that campaign now shows 'in progress' on Liz's dashboard; Apply button now reads 'applications closed' — enrollment confirmed. Thread also mentions visiting the Steinhafels retail store Thursday (~Apr 24) for in-store content. Parent card only — campaign-wide enrollment update.
deals.activity_note: Apr 22: Flexsteel/Steinhafels Popfly campaign confirmed enrolled and in progress; retail store visit Thursday

deals.next_action: Add voiceover intro to SOJOS video per Ruby's revision request, then resubmit
deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Ruby (marketing202@sojosvision.com) reviewed submitted content and asked Liz to add a voiceover introducing the sunglasses and brand. Revision needed before approval. Content was submitted Apr 22 via Google Drive link (includes caption with code MISSLIZSOJOS).
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Ruby at SOJOS reviewed content and requested voiceover addition — revision needed, resubmit when done

deals.next_action: Film Linkind SP6 Smart Solar Pathway Lights content — nighttime only, per brand specs
deals.notes:
[Apr 23]: SocialMediaCollabs relayed detailed filming requirements from Linkind: (1) lighting portion = ~50% of video, not the SP6 product itself, (2) main content must be nighttime shots — NO daylight filming, patterns must be clearly visible, (3) must show app controlling/switching between patterns with visible color changes and animations, (4) light show interface should be accurate, (5) ensure correct lens installed. Content due Mon/Tue Apr 27–28. $2,000 for 1x 60–90s dedicated IG Reel.
[Apr 23]: Platform (SocialMediaCollabs) relayed that concept is approved — brand wants content submitted Monday/Tuesday (Apr 27–28). Lights received ~Apr 19–20.
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Detailed filming requirements received from Linkind — nighttime-only, app pattern shots required, deadline Mon/Tue Apr 27–28
